rationale: Both reviews would push the author to remove the same clearly grounded scope problems: `IsUnipotent` is premature/naive and `ReductiveGroup`/`SemisimpleGroup` are `True` placeholder endpoints, which I can confirm from the diff. Review 2's extra AffineAlgGroup bundling objection depends on an external roadmap directive not shown in the diff and is not enough to make the resulting PR clearly better.
